title: Client Profile
description: AR-oriented client profile for invoice management. Stored in invoices/clients/{client-slug}.json.

client_name.description: Full legal name of the client entity

accounts_payable_email.description: AP department email (often different from business contact)

po_required.description: Whether this client requires a PO number on invoices

po_number_format_notes.description: Notes on PO number format or how to obtain one

vendor_portal_url.description: URL of client's vendor/AP portal for invoice submission

submission_notes.description: Notes on how to submit invoices (portal steps, required attachments, etc.)

preferred_invoice_delivery_method.description: How this client prefers to receive invoices

payment_method_preference.description: How this client typically pays (bank transfer, check, ACH, wire, etc.)

bank_reference_requirement.description: Required reference format for bank transfers

average_days_to_pay.description: Computed average days from invoice to payment

dispute_history_flag.description: Whether this client has a history of disputing invoices

credit_risk_level.description: Assessed credit risk based on payment history

reminder_tone_preference.description: Preferred tone for payment reminders and collections

default_currency.description: Default ISO 4217 currency code for this client

default_tax_rate.description: Default tax rate for this client (e.g., '10%')

contract_ids.description: Links to contracts in opc-contract-manager archive

invoice_history.description: List of invoice IDs issued to this client
